title: Senior Software Engineer - Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates!
